chat_history.content: Can you give me the list of my repos?

Here are some of your repositories:

1. Gemma-7b-ft-QLoRA-300-Alpaca: Fine-tunes Google's Gemma-7B LLM using the Alpaca dataset (300 rows).
2. ManuSinghYadav.github.io: Your personal GitHub Pages site.
3. himalayas-3d-explorer: Interactive 3D Himalayan map explorer with trek routes, live weather, and place search.
4. Intractive-Earth: Interactive Earth project.
5. Art_Treasury-: Private art collection repository.
6. Dairy-khaata-web: Web application project.
7. Dairy_App: Dairy manager app.
8. Mushroom_Classification_All_Models: Classification of mushrooms between edible and non-edible using major classification algorithms.
9. Andrej_Karpathy_Zero_to_Hero: Personal implementations and explorations of Andrej Karpathy's Neural Networks: Zero to Hero YouTube series.
10. Pneumonia-Classification-from-X-Rays: Identification of pneumonia patients by analyzing their X-ray images.

If you want details on any specific repository or more repositories, please let me know!
